subject: URGENT: Production server down
body: Our production environment has been down for 20 minutes. Customers cannot access the platform. We need an immediate response and estimated time to fix.

subject: Suspicious login attempts on your merchant account
body: We detected 47 failed login attempts on your merchant account within the last hour, originating from multiple IP ranges. Access has been temporarily restricted. Please verify your account immediately and rotate your API credentials.

subject: Machine stopped mid-production - order #4471 at risk
body: The CNC unit stopped again with error E-204 and we have a delivery deadline tomorrow morning for order #4471. If we can't restart within the next two hours we will miss the shipment. Please call me back as soon as you read this. +43 664 5551234

subject: Contract termination notice - response required within 48h
body: This is a formal notice regarding clause 12.3 of our service agreement. Due to repeated SLA violations in May, we are initiating the termination process. You have 48 hours to respond with a remediation plan before the termination becomes effective.

subject: ALERT: API error rate above 15% for 10 minutes
body: Automated alert: The error rate on endpoint /api/v2/checkout has exceeded 15% for the past 10 minutes. Affected region: eu-central. This threshold is classified as critical in your alerting policy.

subject: Wrong medication delivered - need replacement TODAY
body: You delivered the wrong items in order #88213 this morning. We received 40 units of product A-113 instead of A-131. We have patients waiting for these. A replacement must arrive today, otherwise we have to escalate this with your management.

subject: Question about my order #10592
body: Hi, I placed order #10592 last Tuesday and the tracking still shows 'label created'. Could you check what's going on? I need the parts before the weekend if possible. Thanks, Anna

subject: Request for quote: 500 units, custom specification
body: Dear Sir or Madam, we are looking for a supplier for approx. 500 units per quarter according to the attached specification. Could you send us a quote including bulk pricing and lead times? We would need first delivery in August.

subject: Return request - item arrived damaged
body: Hello, the housing of the device I ordered (order #10544) has a visible crack, probably from transport. I would like to return it for a replacement. How should I proceed? Do you send a return label or do I have to organize shipping myself?

subject: Invoice #2026-0455 - amount seems incorrect
body: We received invoice #2026-0455 today. The total is 2.340 EUR but our purchase order was for 1.980 EUR. It looks like the old price list was used. Can you check and send a corrected invoice?

subject: Follow-up: proposal from our call last week
body: Hi, following up on our call from last Thursday. You mentioned you'd send the revised proposal by Monday - I haven't received anything yet. Could you give me an update on the timeline? Our budget meeting is on the 12th.

subject: Change delivery address for order #10601
body: Hello, we need to change the delivery address for order #10601. It should go to our new warehouse: Skladova 14, 60200 Brno, instead of the old address. The order has not shipped yet according to tracking. Please confirm the change.

subject: Re: Re: Re: Replacement part availability
body:
> On June 2nd you wrote:
>> We expect the part back in stock mid-June.
>
> Is there any way to get it sooner? Even a used one would work.

Sorry to push again, but mid-June is really too late for us. Is there a compatible alternative part you could recommend instead? Happy to pay express shipping.

Best,
Peter

subject: Please confirm your attendance: fire safety training June 15
body: The annual fire safety training takes place on June 15th, 9:00-11:00 in meeting room B. Attendance is mandatory. Please reply to confirm your participation or propose one of the alternative dates (June 18, June 22).

subject: Cancellation and partial refund
body: Good morning, we ordered 12 units (order #10577) but our renovation project was scaled down and we only need 8. Can we cancel 4 units and get a refund for those? Nothing has been delivered yet.

subject: Which model fits my setup?
body: Hi! I'm looking at the X200 and the X300 on your site. My setup: single-phase 230V, garage workshop, hobby use maybe 2-3 hours a week. The X300 looks nicer but is it overkill? Would appreciate an honest recommendation before I order.

subject: Missing credit note for returned goods
body: Dear team, we returned 15 units on May 19th (RMA-3382, delivery confirmation attached in our previous mail). The return was confirmed received on May 23rd, but we still haven't received the credit note. Please send it this week so we can close the month.

subject: Urgent-ish: can you deliver by June 20?
body: Hi, we have a trade fair on June 21st and would need 3 display units by June 20th at the latest. Your website says 5-7 business days shipping which would be cutting it close. Can you guarantee delivery by the 20th if we order today? If not, no hard feelings, just let us know.

subject: Complaint about support experience
body: I have now called your support line three times this week and was promised a callback each time. Nobody called. The issue itself (registration code not accepted) is still unresolved. I am starting to regret this purchase. Please have someone competent contact me.

subject: Partnership inquiry - reseller conditions
body: Buongiorno, we run a design studio in Bolzano and regularly recommend your products to clients. We would be interested in becoming a reseller. Could you send information about your partner program, margins and minimum order quantities?

subject: Bestellung #10611 - Lieferung unvollständig
body: Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren, in der heutigen Lieferung zu Bestellung #10611 fehlen 2 von 6 Positionen (Pos. 3 und Pos. 5 laut Lieferschein). Bitte um Info, wann die fehlenden Teile nachgeliefert werden. Mit freundlichen Grüßen, Martin Aigner

subject: Candidate for your open Python position - available immediately
body: Hello, we have a strong candidate (5 years Python, ETL pipelines, available immediately) who matches the job ad you posted in April. Is the position still open? If yes, I'll send the profile over. Our placement terms are the usual 20%.

subject: (no subject)
body: Hi, quick question, does the warranty also cover the battery or only the device itself? Mine drains within an hour now, bought it 14 months ago. Roland

subject: Data processing agreement needed
body: Dear team, before we can roll out your software to our staff, our compliance requires a signed data processing agreement (DPA) according to GDPR Art. 28. Do you have a standard template? Please send it for review.

subject: Office closed on June 9th
body: Just a reminder that the office will be closed on Monday June 9th due to a public holiday. No action needed, just plan accordingly.

subject: Your shipment 00340434292135 has been delivered
body: Your shipment was delivered on 03.06.2026 at 10:42 and was handed to the recipient. Thank you for using DHL.

subject: Your invoice for May 2026 is available
body: Your monthly invoice (EUR 49.90) is now available in your customer portal. The amount will be debited from your registered payment method on June 10th. No action is required.

subject: Scheduled maintenance: file server offline Saturday night
body: The file server will be offline for maintenance this Saturday between 22:00 and 02:00. Save your work before the weekend. Email and chat are not affected.

subject: Your account statement is ready
body: Your electronic account statement for May 2026 is now available in your online banking inbox. Please note that statements are archived after 24 months.

subject: Weekly summary: 14 tasks completed
body: Here's your weekly project summary: 14 tasks completed, 6 in progress, 2 overdue. Most active project: Website Relaunch. View the full report in your dashboard.

subject: Confirmation: documents received

subject: Booking confirmed: Room B, June 6, 14:00-15:00
Release notes: version 0.9.2
body: Version 0.9.2 is now available. Changes: improved GPU memory management, fixed a crash when loading quantized models over 30B parameters, new experimental flag for parallel request handling. Update via your package manager.

subject: Ihre Mitgliedsdaten wurden aktualisiert
body: Sehr geehrtes Mitglied, Ihre Daten wurden wie beantragt aktualisiert. Die Änderung ist ab sofort wirksam. Es sind keine weiteren Schritte erforderlich.

body: This week in tech: AI breakthroughs, new JavaScript frameworks nobody asked for, and why everyone is talking about Rust again. Click to read more.

subject: Python Weekly - Issue 712
body: In this issue: What's new in Python 3.14, a deep dive into free-threading performance, 5 underrated standard library modules, and this week's community projects. Read online or unsubscribe below.

body: This week's stories: A solo founder shares how a simple PDF tool reached $10k MRR, why niching down beats going broad, and 3 landing page teardowns. Plus: 12 new products launched by the community.
